features: Have Some Fun In The Bedroom - This 14pk of flavoured condoms for oral, safer sex and contraception come in three tempting fruity flavours - strawberry, cherry and blackcurrant. [All our condoms, are manufactured from Latex]
100% Electronically Tested - These condoms have been through the same rigorous testing as all typical leading brands, which means no unexpected surprises. [Tested to all UK safety regulations]
Lightly Lubricated, Strong and Super Thin - Use these condoms flavoured pack for safer sex and contraception with performance that matches that of all well known brands.

Pleasure for Both Partners – Designed for great sex and powerful orgasm, these condoms thin extra feel heighten sensations for a more enjoyable and intimate experience. Suitable for all couples looking to enhance their moments together.

Discreet & Convenient Packaging – This multipack of condoms arrives in a plain, unbranded package for privacy. Each thin condom is individually foil-sealed to maintain freshness and quality, ensuring you’re always ready when the moment strikes.

This pack contains strawberry, cherry, and blackcurrant flavoured condoms, offering a variety of fruity options for a fun, enhanced experience during oral sex and safer sex. Are these flavoured condoms as safe as regular condoms? Yes, these condoms undergo the same rigorous electronic testing as leading brands to ensure safety, reliability, and protection for contraception and safer sex. How thin are these condoms, and are they comfortable to use? These condoms are ultra-thin yet strong, providing both comfort and durability. They're designed to enhance pleasure without compromising safety. Is the packaging discreet for privacy? Yes, your order will arrive in a plain, discreet package, ensuring complete privacy. Each condom is individually foil-packed to maintain freshness. Can these flavoured condoms be used for both oral and regular sex? Absolutely. These condoms are designed for both oral sex and traditional use, offering pleasure and protection in any intimate situation.
